creator: jake@checker.org
text:
New Port: ports/java/jlex
JLex is a lexical analyzer generator, written for Java, in Java.

How-To-Repeat: 
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/COMMENT
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/DESCR
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/PLIST
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/files
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/files/md5
#	/usr/ports/java/jlex/Makefile
#
echo c - /usr/ports/java/jlex/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/java/jlex/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - /usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg
mkdir -p /usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/COMMENT'
XJLex is a lexical analyzer generator, written for Java, in Java.
END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - /usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/DESCR'
XThe JLex utility is based upon the Lex lexical analyzer generator model.
XJLex takes a specification file similar to that accepted by Lex, then
Xcreates a Java source file for the corresponding lexical analyzer.
X
Xhttp://www.cs.princeton.edu/~appel/modern/java/JLex/
X
X- Jake
Xjake@checker.org
END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/DESCR
echo x - /usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/PLIST'
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CAccept.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CAcceptAnchor.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CAlloc.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CBunch.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CDTrans.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CDfa.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CEmit.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CError.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CInput.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CLexGen.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CMakeNfa.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CMinimize.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CNfa.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CNfa2Dfa.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CNfaPair.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CSet.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CSpec.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/CUtility.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/JavaLexBitSet.class
X%%JAVADIR%%/jlex/Main.class
X@dirrm %%JAVADIR%%/jlex
END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/pkg/PLIST
echo c - /usr/ports/java/jlex/files
mkdir -p /usr/ports/java/jlex/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/java/jlex/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/java/jlex/files/md5 << 'END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/files/md5'
XMD5 (Main.java) = 2845da1175e06a50fca26f62840caaa8
END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/files/md5
echo x - /usr/ports/java/jlex/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/java/jlex/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	jlex
X# Version required:	1.2.3
X# Date created:		1 June 1999
X# Whom:			jake@checker.org
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	Main
XPKGNAME=	jlex-1.2.3
XCATEGORIES=	java
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.cs.princeton.edu/~appel/modern/java/JLex/Archive/1.2.3/
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.java
X
XMAINTAINER=	jake@checker.org
X
XEXTRACT_ONLY=
X
XJAVADIR=	jdk1.1.8
XJAVAC=		${PREFIX}/${JAVADIR}/bin/javac
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${PREFIX}/${JAVADIR}/bin/java:${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk
X
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=	yes
X
XPLIST_SUB=	JAVADIR=${JAVADIR}
X
Xdo-extract:
X	@${RM} -rf ${WRKDIR}
X	@${MKDIR} ${WRKDIR}
X	@${CP} ${DISTDIR}/Main.java ${WRKDIR}
X
Xdo-build:
X	@${JAVAC} ${WRKDIR}/Main.java
X
Xdo-install:
X	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/${JAVADIR}/jlex
X	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/*.class ${PREFIX}/${JAVADIR}/jlex
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${ECHO_MSG} ""
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "JLex is installed in ${PREFIX}/${JAVADIR}/jlex."
X	@${ECHO_MSG} "See http://www.cs.princeton.edu/~appel/modern/java/JLex."
X	@${ECHO_MSG} ""
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/java/jlex/Makefile
exit
